title: 聖夜に並んで走るため

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and Biwa Hayahide tell me they'd like
to go out and train. I decide to accompany them,
but...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay, we made it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We're at the summit. It stands to reason there'd
be snow here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Listen carefully, Trainer. The reason I came here is
because...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I want to go partner running with Santa's reindeer!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I know exactly how you feel. That was the same
response I had when I heard her plans.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Huh? How fast I think Santa's reindeer are?
...Given the number of children in the northern
hemisphere alone, I'd say they probably travel at
close to the speed of light.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, is that true?! I wonder what kind of
training they did to get that fast.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...?! You're not intending to... try and match their
ability, are you? It's the speed of light...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. Running alongside Santa and his
reindeer sounds really fun!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...And that's our story.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yep! Don't you think it sounds fun, Trainer?
choice_data_list: (There's not a hint of doubt in her eyes...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that look on her face, I realized there was no
dissuading her. You know how she is, right?
choice_data_list: All right... Time to run like the reindeer!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Okay, the decorations in the log cabin are
perfect. Let's see how much speed Oguri can gain
now that we've arranged her surroundings to
match that of Santa Claus.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... I've only run a little, but it's so difficult
keeping my footing on this snow track.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Reindeer legs must be super sturdy to be able to
run easily in these conditions.
choice_data_list:
That only means you need to train your lower
body as well.

That only means you need to train your lower
body as well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: In that case, I have an idea. Come along.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've built some snowmen along the open pathway.
Try to avoid each one as you run through, every
firm step you take should build more strength in
your legs.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing. Plus, I don't want to hurt any of the
snowmen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Phew. That training was tougher than I expected...
but it was nothing I couldn't handle!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Still, the reindeer have to run while pulling a
sleigh along...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Which means I have to follow their example! As
for the sleigh... Trainer, could you hop in?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: That's a fine idea. I'll be your backup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, I end up riding in Oguri Cap's sleigh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! How am I doing?! Do you think this is
good form?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, she's running so fast it's hard to believe
she's pulling a sleigh at all. It goes to show how
seriously she's taking this...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a bit of training, I decide to time her to
measure her progress.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... How... did I do?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yes! I knew training in the snow would pay off!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
And also... Ho ho ho, hee, hoo... Yeah. This is
what I hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All right, Trainer! Next, let's try actually running
with Santa's reindeer!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now that I feel up to par, I want to put my
toughened legs to the test!
choice_data_list: But where will you race them?
But where will you race them?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Now that I feel up to par, I want to put my
toughened legs to the test!
choice_data_list: But where will you race them?
But where will you race them?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hm. That's a good point... Where do Santa and
co. actually live?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, this hasn't been proven, but it's often said
that Santa's "north pole" home is actually in
Finland.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So they're overseas... That's a long way away.
Plus, they do things differently in races abroad...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Guess I'll have to do my best in Japan first. Right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Determined to someday compete against Santa's
reindeer, Oguri Cap resolves to work even harder.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: There isn't?
choice_data_list:
Shouldn't you build more strength before you
face them?

Shouldn't you build more strength before you
face them?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah! You're right! It'd be disrespectful to the
reindeer if I didn't race them at my best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Okay. First, I'll get stronger, and then I'll challenge them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're already seeing great results, so I expect
you'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Right! If I keep this up, I'll be able to go partner
running with the reindeer before long. Ahhh, how
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a radiant smile on her face, Oguri Cap
commits to her training regimen.
